    • newTap

      public Json newTap(Json params)
      Adds new tap to the list of active Taps. If its present, it modifies it
      Parameters:
      params - parameters with the information of the new Tap
      Returns:
      the new tap

    • deleteTap

      public Json deleteTap(Json params)
      Deletes new tap to the list of active Taps
      Parameters:
      params - parameters with the information of the new Tap
      Returns:
      the new tap

    • setIp

      public Json setIp(String name, String ip)
      Changes the IP to contact the tap API. It changes the configuration if the CSL-Client side and records it into a file.
      Parameters:
      name - of the tap
      ip - new ip of the tap API
      Returns:
      an API response with the new tap configuration if the field result.

    • setPort

      public Json setPort(String name, int port)
      Changes the IP to contact the tap API. It changes the configuration if the CSL-Client side and records it into a file.
      Parameters:
      name - of the tap
      port - new port to contact the tap API
      Returns:
      an API response with the new tap configuration if the field result.

    • getSuricataLogs

      public Json getSuricataLogs(Json params)
      Gets the file containing the IDS logs of the given tap
      Parameters:
      params - general params of the request
      Returns:
      the logs file of the ids

    • clearSuricataLogs

      public Json clearSuricataLogs(String name)
      Gets the IDS logs of the given tap
      Parameters:
      name - name of the tap
      Returns:
      the last logs of the ids

      public Json getConfFromTap(Json params)

      public Json getTapConf(Json params)
      Gets the configuration of the one tap. It's the configuration tof CSLClient to connect the tap
      Returns:
      the configuration of the tap

      Gets the configuration of the one tap. It's the configuration tof CSLClient to connect the tap
      Returns:
      the configuration of the tap

      public Json getTapsConf(Json params)

      the configuration of the taps

    • init

      public boolean init(Json config, String cslDir)
      Initialization of the TAPs commands
      Specified by:
      init in interface ICSLService
      Specified by:
      init in class Service
      Parameters:
      config - the configuration section of the configuration file
      cslDir - the CSL directory
      Returns:
      true if the initialization happened with no problems, false otherwise.
